$comment: Phillips NY080126 — sale-level source packet for batch ingestion (2026-07-24 order). Binds the exact auction URL and both PDF SHA-256 pins. Lot facts are NOT listed here — they are generated by code from these pinned sources; this file must never grow a hand-typed lot list.

auctionPagePdf.filename: The New York Watch Auction_ XIV Saturday, June 13, 2026.pdf

sale.sale_name: The New York Watch Auction: XIV

estimates_omission_sentence: Phillips printed pre-sale estimates for the lots; estimates are deliberately not captured anywhere in this evidence layer (the schema does not model them, and realized prices are never used to carry them).
